valuationMethod: KRA CRSP / valuation-template style workflow with fallback user FOB/CIF and valuation seeds.

ageRules.message: Kenya allows used vehicles less than 8 years old from first registration.

steeringRules.message: Kenya requires imported vehicles to be right-hand drive unless an official exemption applies.

inspectionRules.label: KEBS pre-shipment roadworthiness inspection
inspectionRules.message: Pre-shipment roadworthiness inspection certificate is required.

sourceNotes.name: KRA motor vehicle import procedure
sourceNotes.note: Used for age, RHD, KEBS, and headline tax stack.

sourceNotes.name: KRA Motor Vehicle Valuation Template
sourceNotes.note: Architecture supports importing this valuation pack without runtime scraping.

disclaimers: KRA valuation can differ from invoice price. Treat this as an estimate unless the current valuation pack has been imported.
Age and steering compliance failures can block importation regardless of the calculated tax.

faqs.question: What is the Japan to Mombasa happy path?
faqs.answer: Use Japan as the source market, Mombasa as the port, Nairobi or another city as destination, and right-hand drive as the steering side. The calculator will add KEBS inspection and KRA-style taxes.

faqs.question: What if I do not know the CRSP value?
faqs.answer: Use make, model, and year. The result is labelled as an estimate based on the current valuation pack or fallback seed until the exact KRA value is uploaded.

copy.intro: Estimate a Kenya car import from source price or make/model/year through Mombasa, including KRA taxes, KEBS inspection, inland delivery, and registration.
copy.hiddenCosts: The biggest misses are valuation uplift versus invoice, KEBS inspection, IDF, RDL, storage, and inland delivery to Nairobi, Kisumu, or Eldoret.
